query:
-- Step 1: Add new column with new enum values
ALTER TABLE adCreatives ADD COLUMN headlineFormula_new enum('benefit','social_proof','curiosity','contrast','challenge') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'benefit';

-- Step 2: Copy data with mapping
UPDATE adCreatives SET headlineFormula_new = CASE
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'banned' THEN 'benefit'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'secret' THEN 'social_proof'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'leaked' THEN 'curiosity'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'glitch' THEN 'contrast'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'forbidden' THEN 'challenge'
END;

-- Step 3: Drop old column
ALTER TABLE adCreatives DROP COLUMN headlineFormula;

-- Step 4: Rename new column
ALTER TABLE adCreatives CHANGE headlineFormula_new headlineFormula enum('benefit','social_proof','curiosity','contrast','challenge') NOT NULL;
